sql_array: CREATE TABLE geo_data (id UInt64, h3_index UInt64, value Float32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO geo_data (id, h3_index, value) VALUES (1, h3GetRes0Indexes()[1], 1.5), (2, h3GetRes0Indexes()[2], NULL);
SELECT id, h3_index, value FROM geo_data WHERE NOT h3_index IN (SELECT h3GetRes0Indexes()[index % length(h3GetRes0Indexes())] FROM numbers(100)) AND value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) AS count FROM geo_data GROUP BY id HAVING NOT(count > 1) OR count = 0;
CREATE TABLE temp_geo (h3_index UInt64, status String) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO temp_geo SELECT h3_index, CASE WHEN value IS NULL THEN 'NULL' ELSE 'VALID' END FROM geo_data;
SELECT g.id, NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM temp_geo t WHERE t.h3_index = g.h3_index) AS is_missing FROM geo_data g;
SELECT h3GetRes0Indexes()[arrayJoin(h3GetRes0Indexes())], NOT(value IS NULL OR h3_index > 10) AS condition FROM geo_data;
CREATE TABLE boundary_data (id UInt64, num_value Float32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO boundary_data (id, num_value) VALUES (1, 3.402823466e+38), (2, -3.402823466e+38), (3, 0.0), (4, NULL);
SELECT h3GetRes0Indexes()[NOT(num_value IS NULL)] FROM boundary_data WHERE NOT(num_value < 0) AND (SELECT COUNT() FROM boundary_data) > 0;
SELECT id, h3_index, value FROM geo_data ORDER BY (h3_index, NOT(value < 1.0)) DESC;
SELECT sum(h3GetRes0Indexes()[id % 64]) AS total FROM geo_data GROUP BY NOT value IS NULL;
SELECT id FROM geo_data WHERE (NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM temp_geo t WHERE t.h3_index = geo_data.h3_index) OR value IS NULL) AND h3_index = h3GetRes0Indexes()[id % 64];
